class.name: SkaldQuery
class.brief_description: A method call query from Skald.
class.description: Represents a script-initiated method call that expects a return value (a [code]get[/code]). The game should handle the call and provide a return value via [method SkaldEngine.answer]. A method call that does not expect a return value arrives as a [SkaldAction] instead, and must be advanced with [method SkaldEngine.act] (or [method SkaldEngine.advance]). .method: string .args: Array .get_arg_count() -> int .get_arg(index) -> Variant

members.member: The arguments passed to the method.
